items.title: Funnel retrofit IN PROGRESS — 5/20 Fuzzy pins flipped to direct Amazon
items.detail: Diagnosed 2026-05-07 morning: 199 Fuzzy impressions / 0 outbound clicks because live Pinterest pins were silently still pointing at fuzzy.html linktree (cavapoo bug pattern), even though tracker said Amazon. Phase 1 retrofit done 9:30 AM 5/7: 5 Fuzzy pins manually flipped via Chrome MCP edit dialog and verified live Visit-site link points at amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/5RB44WI33ISZ. Remaining 15 Fuzzy pins to retrofit at 5/session pace per CLAUDE.md rate limit. Watch fuzzy_frames_ai outbound_clicks in next analytics scrape (24-48h). LLD already had 7 clicks per actual Amazon dashboard so the original '0 clicks' claim was stale.
